expectations.evidence: Output explicitly declines: 'This request falls outside the scope of the /match skill.' Lists what it does NOT do: 'Screen CVs or resumes from external applicants', 'Rank external candidates'. No CV screening or candidate ranking provided.

expectations.text: Redirects to the appropriate skill or resource for external recruiting
expectations.evidence: Recommends: 'Use the recruiting-pipeline skill (referenced in the match skill's own scope statement)' with specific capabilities listed: CV screening, candidate ranking, pipeline management.

expectations.text: Does NOT produce candidate rankings for external applicants
expectations.evidence: No candidate rankings appear anywhere in the output. Output is purely a scope boundary notice with redirect guidance.
